research_goal: Compare onboarding and first project creation experience for our product and two competitors.

products.name: Our Product
products.notes: Replace with staging URL and a test account.

products.name: Competitor A
products.notes: Public flow only unless explicit credentials are provided.

products.name: Competitor B
products.notes: Public flow only unless explicit credentials are provided.

scenarios.title: First-time onboarding
scenarios.persona: New product manager evaluating the tool
scenarios.goal: Understand the product value and reach the first meaningful workspace state.
steps: Open the product landing or app entry URL
Identify primary call to action and account entry options
Start signup or login with provided safe credentials if available
Observe the first screen after account entry
Find guidance that explains the next best action
success_criteria: Primary value proposition is visible within the first screen
The path to enter the product is clear
The user understands the next action after entering

scenarios.title: Create first project
scenarios.persona: New product manager setting up a team workflow
scenarios.goal: Create a first project or equivalent workspace object.
steps: Locate the create project or equivalent action
Complete required fields with realistic sample content
Confirm that the created object is visible and editable
success_criteria: The created project is confirmed on screen
